item.name: Mythril Sovereign
item.description:
Known for its beautifully shimmering scales, which are in contrast to its rather lackluster meat.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: An elusive fish known to travel the seas along spectral currents. The faint glow of their scales from absorbing the currents' aether makes them a spectacular catch.
